name: whatsapp-relay
description: Link a local WhatsApp account, locate chats, and send text messages with URL previews disabled.

interface.longDescription: A reduced WhatsApp relay for local QR authentication, chat metadata lookup, and explicit text sending. It does not read message bodies or let WhatsApp control Codex.
defaultPrompt: Link my WhatsApp account and verify the auth status
Find a WhatsApp contact or group by name
Send an explicit WhatsApp text message to a contact or group
